description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and a mix of white, black, and gray exterior surfaces. The structure is set on a large, rectangular lot with distinct geometric landscaping, including green lawn sections and paved walkways. The main building is composed of multiple interlocking volumes, with the central section rising higher than the surrounding wings. Windows are arranged in horizontal bands and vertical strips, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a fenced perimeter and a small outbuilding or covered area in one corner, possibly for utilities or storage. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric landscaping, horizontal and vertical window bands, and a minimalist color palette of white, black, and gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, central raised section, and geometric lawn patterns leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated layout, horizontal window bands, and the fenced perimeter with a small outbuilding visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back entrance, additional green space, and a secondary structure in the corner of the lot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the main building's height, flat roof, and the interplay of green and paved areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a clean, unornamented door integrated into the facade
